request.prompt: a delete confirmation with a single prominent delete button and nothing else

children.text: Are you sure you want to proceed with the deletion? This action is irreversible.

components.title: Confirm Deletion?
components.description: Are you sure you want to proceed with the deletion? This action is irreversible.
